headline: NETLIST EXPANDS LEGAL ACTION AGAINST SAMSUNG AND GOOGLE FOR INFRINGEMENT OF NEW AI MEMORY PATENTS
summary: Netlist, Inc. (OTCBQ: NLST) today announced it has initiated new legal proceedings against Samsung in the U.S. International Trade Commission (ITC) and the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Texas. These actions are based on the infringement of Netlist's U.S. Patent Nos. 12,646,537 and 12,650,937, which respectively read on Samsung's high-bandwidth memory (HBM) products and Samsung's DDR5 RDIMMs and MRDIMMs. The new ITC complaint names Google, Supermicro, Nvidia and Broadcom as addi

content.title: NETLIST EXPANDS LEGAL ACTION AGAINST SAMSUNG AND GOOGLE FOR INFRINGEMENT OF NEW AI MEMORY PATENTS
content.summary: Netlist, Inc.
